0.content:
# Homebanking — Overview
RED metrics (Rate, Errors, Duration) de los 5 microservicios (`auth-service`, `account-service`, `transaction-service`, `notification-service`, `api-gateway`) + salud de Kubernetes en el namespace `homebanking`.

1.title: Servicios

2.title: Latencia
2.description: Percentiles p50/p90/p95/p99 agregados de los 5 servicios homebanking
2.query:
timeseries Latency50 = percentile(dt.service.request.response_time,50),
Latency90 = percentile(dt.service.request.response_time,90),
Latency95 = percentile(dt.service.request.response_time,95),
Latency99 = percentile(dt.service.request.response_time,99),
filter: in(dt.service.name, {"auth-service","account-service","transaction-service","notification-service","api-gateway"})
| fieldsAdd Latency50, Latency90, Latency95, Latency99

3.title: Error Rate %
3.query:
timeseries error = sum(dt.service.request.failure_count), total= sum(dt.service.request.count), filter: in(dt.service.name, {"auth-service","account-service","transaction-service","notification-service","api-gateway"})
| fieldsAdd errorRate = error[]/total[] *100
| fieldsAdd errorRate
|fieldsRemove error,total

4.title: Calls
4.query:
timeseries Calls = sum(dt.service.request.count), filter: in(dt.service.name, {"auth-service","account-service","transaction-service","notification-service","api-gateway"})
| fieldsAdd Calls

6.title: CPU Usage by Workload
6.query: timeseries cpu = sum(dt.kubernetes.container.cpu_usage), by:{k8s.workload.name}, filter: k8s.namespace.name == "homebanking"

8.title: Pod Restarts (namespace homebanking)
8.query:
timeseries restarts = sum(dt.kubernetes.container.restarts), by:{k8s.pod.name}, filter: k8s.namespace.name == "homebanking"
| fieldsAdd total_restarts = arraySum(restarts)
| filter total_restarts > 0
| fields k8s.pod.name, total_restarts

9.title: OOM Kills (namespace homebanking)
9.query:
timeseries oom_kills = sum(dt.kubernetes.container.oom_kills), by:{k8s.pod.name}, filter: k8s.namespace.name == "homebanking"
| fieldsAdd total_oom_kills = arraySum(oom_kills)
| filter total_oom_kills > 0
| fields k8s.pod.name, total_oom_kills

10.title: Active Davis Problems (services + Kubernetes)
10.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems
| filter not(dt.davis.is_duplicate) and event.status == "ACTIVE"
| filter matchesPhrase(smartscape.affected_entity.types, "K8S_") or matchesPhrase(smartscape.affected_entity.types, "SERVICE")
| fields display_id, event.name, event.category, event.status
